context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures factory contract indexing, uses composite primary keys instead of string concatenation, identifies child contracts via event.log.address, and follows address/type conventions.

checklist.name: Factory config
checklist.description: Uses factory() helper in ponder.config.ts to configure the pair contract with the factory address and PairCreated event

checklist.name: Composite primary key
checklist.description: Schema uses primaryKey({ columns: [...] }) for tables needing multi-field identifiers, NOT string concatenation like `${a}-${b}`

checklist.name: Child contract address
checklist.description: Swap handler uses event.log.address to identify which pair contract emitted the event

checklist.name: ABIs as const
checklist.description: Both ABI files export with `as const` assertion

checklist.name: Hex for addresses
checklist.description: Schema uses t.hex() for pool/pair address columns, not t.text()

checklist.name: Bigint for amounts
checklist.description: Schema uses t.bigint() for swap amount columns (amount0In, amount1In, etc.)

checklist.name: Pool address index
checklist.description: Schema includes an index on the pool/pair address column for query filtering

checklist.name: Virtual imports
checklist.description: Indexing file uses 'ponder:registry' and 'ponder:schema' imports, not relative paths

checklist.name: Lowercase addresses
checklist.description: Contract addresses in config are fully lowercase, not checksummed

checklist.name: Correct startBlock
checklist.description: Factory contract startBlock is set to the deployment block (10000835), not 0

checklist.name: Store API usage
checklist.description: Handler uses context.db for writes, not raw SQL
